title: Technical Lead
details: Leading platform engineering initiatives for user access management, session handling, and enterprise security.
Architecting scalable infrastructure and mentoring developers across teams.

title: Team Leader – Software Development
details: Directed medium to large-scale enterprise projects in payroll and human capital management systems.
Architected highly scalable access management solutions handling tenant-wide permissions.
Introduced automated integration testing with 100% coverage for core infrastructure.
Reduced live production issues by 50% and processing time from 60s+ to under 5s.
Implemented monitoring via Grafana and Splunk enabling proactive resolution of 80% of issues.
Integrated Jira Change Management with GitLab pipelines, doubling development efficiency.
Built documentation hub covering 70%+ modules, reducing onboarding time by 20%.
Coached interns to build a component library and developer documentation platform.

title: Software Developer
details: Developed enterprise authentication systems including 2FA, SSO, recovery flows, and session management.
Implemented OWASP security best practices across access management modules.
Led scalability improvements for login and permission systems across all Paycom tenants.
Worked extensively with PHP, React, SQL, TypeScript, Splunk, and Grafana.

title: Software Engineering Intern
details: Built internal tooling using React and TypeScript for subscription and billing support.
Integrated CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Workflows and Artifactory.
Contributed to customer-facing commerce and streaming platform features.

title: Software Development Consultant
details: Built analytics reporting platform using React and AWS Elastic Beanstalk.
Implemented SSO across multiple services.
Maintained access management systems and migrated production PostgreSQL databases.
Developed custom Moodle plugins (PHP) and mentored interns.
